mapper.select: select e.emp_email, e.emp_pass, e.emp_no, e.emp_name, a.aut_name, ep.pos_name, c.com_name, e.com_id, e.emp_id, e.dept_id, e.pos_id from emp_auth ea join employee e on e.emp_id = ea.emp_id join authority a on a.aut_id = ea.aut_id join emp_position ep on ep.pos_id = e.pos_id join company c on c.com_id = e.com_id where e.emp_email = #{username}
select ea.aut_id, a.aut_name from emp_auth ea right join authority a on ea.aut_id = a.aut_id where a.aut_id = #{autId} group by ea.aut_id, a.aut_name
